identity.title: Identity
identity.eudiInfo: Your identity is verified through the EU Digital Identity framework. This ensures one-person-one-account in Eulesia.
identity.upgradeInfo: Upgrade to EUDI Wallet when available for stronger identity verification.

invites.title: My Invites
invites.shareInfo: Share codes to invite others to Eulesia
invites.noCodesYet: No invite codes yet. Create one to invite someone!

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.repliesDesc: When someone replies to your discussions
notifications.pushDesc: Receive notifications even when the browser is closed

password.title: Admin password
password.seedTitle: Bootstrap password is only a seed
password.description: The SOPS-provided password only seeds this operator account. After you change it here, rebuilds keep your chosen password instead of overwriting it.
password.recovery: If the password is lost, operations can run a one-shot reseed build.
password.success: Password updated. Other sessions were signed out.

errors.tooShort: New password must be at least 6 characters
errors.notSupported: This account does not support password changes

privacy.title: Privacy & Data
privacy.notProduct: Your data is not the product
privacy.notProductDesc: Eulesia does not collect behavioral data for advertising. We do not sell your data or use it to manipulate your attention.
privacy.deleteConfirmTitle: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
privacy.deleteConfirmDesc: This will remove all your personal data, messages, and votes. Your public discussions and comments will be anonymized. This action cannot be undone. Type POISTA to confirm.

personalData.title: My data
personalData.description: All your personal data stored in Eulesia. You can download it in JSON format.
personalData.exportInfo: In accordance with GDPR (Articles 15 & 20), you can download all your data. The file contains all your personal data stored in Eulesia in JSON format.

security.title: Security & devices
security.description: Each browser or phone gets its own encryption keys for private conversations.
security.ready: This browser is ready for secure messaging
security.readyDescription: Private chats and groups will use end-to-end encryption on this browser.
security.settingUpDescription: We are generating keys and registering this browser now. Your other devices stay active.
security.trustRequired: Trust this browser before enabling private chats
security.trustRequiredDescription: No devices are registered yet. Review this browser and confirm that you want to trust it before private chats and groups are enabled here.
security.setupFailed: This browser still needs device setup
security.setupFailedDescription: Open encrypted chats only after this browser has a registered device.
security.pairingRequired: This browser needs approval from another device
security.pairingRequiredDescription: Because you already have active devices, enter a pairing code from one of them before this browser can join encrypted conversations.
security.deviceLimitHint: You have reached the 10-device limit. Revoke an old device and try again.
security.signOutToRemove: Sign out to remove this device.
security.noDevicesDescription: Once setup completes, your device list will appear here.
security.trustedDevicesHint: These are your already paired devices. This browser is not paired yet, so every card stays gray.
security.newDeviceHint: You already have active devices elsewhere. This browser still needs its own keys before it can join encrypted conversations.
security.enterPairingCodeDescription: Open Settings on one of your active devices, generate a pairing code there, and enter it here.
security.generatePairingCodeDescription: Generate a short-lived pairing code on this trusted device, then enter it on the new browser or phone.
security.revokeLastDeviceWarning: Revoke the last paired device? This will remove secure messaging access and delete the user's private chats.

userProfile.privateChatReadyDescription: Both sides have registered devices. Messages will be end-to-end encrypted.
userProfile.preparingPrivateChat: Setting up secure messaging on this browser.
userProfile.privateChatNeedsYourDevice: Finish device setup in Settings before starting a private chat.
userProfile.privateChatNeedsRecipientDevice: {{name}} has not registered a device yet, so encrypted chat is unavailable.
userProfile.privateChatCheckFailed: Could not verify device availability right now.
userProfile.privateChatTooltipReady: Start an end-to-end encrypted private chat

avatar.allowedFormats: Only JPEG, PNG, WebP and GIF allowed

institutions.title: My Institutions
institutions.noInstitutions: You don't manage any institutions yet.
institutions.claimDesc: Request to manage your municipality or institution's official account on Eulesia.
institutions.noAvailable: No available institution accounts at this time.
institutions.claimSent: Claim submitted! An administrator will review your request.
institutions.createOrgDesc: Create a profile for your business or organization on Eulesia.
institutions.orgCreated: Organization created! An administrator will verify the account.
